The European champions could even offer Ronaldo as a makeweight as part of their future attempts to sign the Brazilian.

Inter is continuing to work on the transfer market as they try to improve Luciano Spalletti's roster for the second half of the season. One of their focuses has been Javier Pastore of PSG, who would like to return to Italy. At the moment, however, the French club only wants to sell the player permanently and not loan him. It is uncertain whether the nerazzurri would entertain the option of a loan with an obligation to purchase. Then there is also the agreement that needs to be reached with the player, who currently earns 6.5 million per season plus bonuses. The negotiations are on stand-by but the teams are still in contact with each other.

PSG has also received offers between 25-40 million from Liverpool and Tottenham, but the player has rejected those destinations. Pastore's agent is currently in Milan to see if he can unlock a transfer.

http://gianlucadimarzio.com/en/inter-negotiations-for-psgs-pastore-on-stand-by-liverpool-and-tottenham-also-interested

Inter is looking for reinforcements for the coming months, but they are also already planning for next season. One objective for June could be Tottenham's Erik Lamela. The nerazzurri are believed to be able to invest for a great objective in the summer, and they have made first contact with the player's agent, as Lamela is a pupil of Sabatini who brought him to Roma in 2011.

http://gianlucadimarzio.com/en/inter-interested-in-tottenhams-lamela-for-june-the-situation

韓光宋（Han Kwang Song）的經理人史譚柏連尼（Sandro Stemperini）回應近日指意甲祖雲達斯有意收購該韓國超新星的傳聞：「卡利亞里跟祖雲達斯正在談判，雙方均持開放態度，關於轉會費，就由他們決定吧，我們將不會參與，只會個別跟他們討論，希望達成協議。」

19歲的韓光宋今季被外借至意乙佩魯賈吸收比賽經驗，史譚柏連尼坦言祖記場場都派員注視：「過去兩天，我們一直跟柏拉迪治（祖雲達斯體育總監）商討可能性，他們的興趣始於去年9月，祖雲達斯幾乎每星期都派球探觀看佩魯賈的比賽。」

「我認為，韓光宋這季餘下時間將會留效佩魯賈或卡利亞里，他可能會在意乙跟佩魯賈一起完成球季，之後再會效力卡利亞里半季，（卡利亞里）總裁古連尼很想看到他穿上卡利亞里球衣，如成事的話，祖雲達斯也將希望他獲得合適的比賽經驗。」

PSG president Nasser Al-Khelaifi said on Saturday he was "2,000 per cent sure" that Neymar will stay at the club for next season.

The world's most expensive player scored twice in a 4-0 rout of Montpellier on his return from a two-match absence through injury.

Spanish media reports earlier this week said 25-year-old Neymar was unhappy in Paris and set to join Real Madrid at the end of the campaign, but Al-Khelaifi rubbished the claims.

"It's a rumour and of course it's not true," said the Qatari.

"He's happy here, he wants to stay here. He only came here five months ago and he still has four and a half years left on his contract.

"The Spaniards want to start a little (game), but we don't want to get into this game. He won't 100 per cent be with us next season, but 2,000 per cent."
